title: cleistocactus neoroezlii
intro: Cleistocactus neoroezlii, also known as the 'Red Devil' or 'Rezlii's Cleistocactus', is a species of cactus native to Bolivia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Cleistocactus neoroezlii include its ability to treat various ailments such as wounds, fever, and respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by infusing the stems in water or oil, and are often used topically to treat skin irritations and internal infections.
